reference: I hit my chin pretty hard yesterday. When I opened a swinging door, it slammed into my chin. Now, I feel a lump on my chin, and it is very tender and hurts when I touch it. Is it possible for it to be broken, or will it eventually heal by itself?
text: I hit my chin pretty hard yesterday. When I opened a swinging door, it slammed into my chin. Now I feel a lump on my chin, and it is very tender and hurts when I touch it. Is it possible for it to be broken, or will it eventually heal by itself?
